title: JV-20 - GitHub Releases auto-update checker, consent UX, validation, and rollback

labels.name: level: atomic
labels.description: Small independent execution slice that can be assigned directly

body:
## Summary

Implement an opt-in auto-update flow that checks GitHub Releases, validates downloads, and rolls back safely.

## Why is this needed?

The user requested support for auto-update when GitHub has a newer version. Updating a Windows exe must be consented, validated, and recoverable.

## Current context

This WBS comes from tentacle research on 2026-05-21. Current repo state: mt_provider still defaults to google; src/bin/mt_bench.rs emits a pending lf-04-v1 fixture; local OPUS-MT provider exists behind local-mt but lacks benchmark-proven realtime replacement evidence; config has explicit mt_cloud_fallback consent; #372 closed with routing/fixture only; #383 tracks 60fps render performance; PR #407 aligns docs with local-first STT but does not make local MT default.

## Inputs

- GitHub Releases as source of truth.
- Release artifacts and SHA256SUMS from JV-18.
- Installer/portable zip modes.
- Config/onboarding/settings UX.

## Outputs

- Update config: enabled, channel stable/prerelease, last_checked, check interval.
- GitHub release check with semantic version compare.
- Download validation via SHA256SUMS and optional WinVerifyTrust/signature.
- Installer handoff and portable self-replace rollback path.

## Implementation approach

- Default to manual/ask-before-install unless product explicitly accepts automatic installs.
- Never send API keys or transcript data in update checks.
- Use GitHub public releases API or unauthenticated endpoint.
- For installer: run setup silently with close/restart application flags after user consent. For portable: write update.cmd with watchdog rollback.
- Keep previous exe until new version starts successfully.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] User can opt in/out and choose stable/prerelease channel.
- [ ] Updater detects newer GitHub release and ignores older/equal versions.
- [ ] Download is rejected if checksum/signature validation fails.
- [ ] Rollback restores previous version after failed portable update.
- [ ] No update check occurs when disabled.

## Test cases / evidence gates

- [ ] Mock GitHub release JSON tests.
- [ ] Version compare tests.
- [ ] Checksum mismatch rejection.
- [ ] Installer command construction test.
- [ ] Portable rollback simulation.
- [ ] No-secret network request test.

## Dependencies

- Depends on JV-18 release artifacts.
- Can ship after first local-MT release candidate if scoped to future releases.

## Agent routing

Build: reliability/release specialist on claude-sonnet-4.6+. Security review for download validation.

## Project / WBS

- WBS key: JV-20
- Wave: RP3 auto-update
- Project target: magicpro97/project/2
- Labels: type: feature, type: release, area: packaging, area: reliability, priority:P1, level: atomic

## Duplicate / extension note

New feature; no existing auto-update issue found.
